title: Navidrome Segment 04
summary: Mid-development segment focused on major feature additions: ListenBrainz scrobbling integration, smart playlists (phase 1) with rule-based criteria, lyrics support with synced lyrics UI, expanded artist detail pages with theming, track detail dialogs, monokai theme, playlist owner reassignment, and a large wave of dependency upgrades (Go 1.17, prettier, testing-library, viper, ginkgo, etc.).
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: Mid-development segment focused on major feature additions: ListenBrainz scrobbling integration, smart playlists (phase 1) with rule-based criteria, lyrics support with synced lyrics UI, expanded artist detail pages with theming, track detail dialogs, monokai theme, playlist owner reassignment, and a large wave of dependency upgrades (Go 1.17, prettier, testing-library, viper, ginkgo, etc.).

nodes.label: React UI Frontend
nodes.description: The React-Admin web frontend including artist show pages, album views, themes (ligera, monokai, spotify), audio player with synced lyrics, playlist management, track detail dialog, and ListenBrainz settings. Touched by PRs for artist detail (1287), track details (1258), synced lyrics (1406), expanded artist page (1391), smart playlists (1403), monokai theme (1669, 1670), and many UI dependency bumps.

nodes.label: Core Business Logic
nodes.description: Core services including external metadata, playlists with smart playlist evaluation, scrobbler/play tracker, share functionality, artwork caching, and ListenBrainz/Last.fm agent integrations. Touched by PRs for ListenBrainz (1424), smart playlists (1403), lyrics (1379), and playlist owner (1437).

nodes.label: Persistence Layer
nodes.description: Repository implementations for playlists (with smart playlist support), media files, artists, genres, and base repository utilities. Touched by PRs for smart playlists (1403), unknown artist (1387), playlist owner (1437), and scrobble state (1432).

nodes.label: Domain Models
nodes.description: Domain model structs including playlist with criteria rules, media file with channels, album with smart fields, and the criteria DSL for smart playlists. Touched by PRs for smart playlists (1403), audio channels (1294), and playlist improvements (1437, 1485).

nodes.label: Go Dependencies
nodes.description: Go module dependency management including Go 1.17 toolchain, viper 1.9, ginkgo 1.16.5, gomega 1.17, squirrel upgrades, bluemonday updates, ttlcache versions, httprate, jwtauth, and jwx upgrades.

nodes.label: Media Scanner
nodes.description: Tag scanning, metadata reading (taglib wrapper with platform-specific filename handling), playlist importing with smart playlist support, and mapping improvements. Touched by PRs for audio channels (1294), smart playlists (1403), and various mapping fixes.

nodes.label: Database Migrations
nodes.description: Schema migrations for smart playlists, media file channels, order title, unescape lyrics, alphabetical artist index, and removing invalid artist IDs. Touched by PRs for smart playlists (1403), audio channels (1294), and data cleanup (1464).

nodes.label: Subsonic API Layer
nodes.description: Subsonic-compatible REST API with lyrics endpoint, playlist operations, user ratings, album list total count header, browsing, and wire injection. Touched by PRs for lyrics (1379), smart playlists (1403), user ratings (1478), and albumlist count (1360).

nodes.label: Server Infrastructure
nodes.description: HTTP server with native API endpoints, serve_index for frontend config, CORS middleware, workbox service worker setup, and signal handling. Touched by PRs for ListenBrainz (1424), CORS total count (1470), signaler cancel (1638), and native playlists API.

nodes.label: Configuration & Constants
nodes.description: Application configuration for new features (ListenBrainz enabled, lyrics support), constants (version, mime types), and feature flags. Touched by PRs for ListenBrainz config rename (1443), lyrics (1379), and various feature additions.

nodes.label: CLI Commands
nodes.description: CLI entry points with wire injection updates for new services, root command configuration for ListenBrainz, and signaler for graceful exit. Touched by PRs for ListenBrainz (1424), signaler (1638), and scrobble state (1432).

nodes.label: Utility Libraries
nodes.description: Shared utilities including cache/spread_fs, weighted random chooser, file helpers, sanitize strings, and request helpers. Touched by PRs for smart playlists (1403, 1433) and scrobble state (1432).

edges.label: UI fetches data via Subsonic REST API
